mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, level FROM category WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT c.id, c.parent_id, c.name, c.level, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM category child WHERE child.parent_id = c.id ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS has_children, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM category child WHERE child.parent_id = c.id ) THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS selectable FROM category c ORDER BY c.level ASC, c.parent_id ASC, c.id ASC
